    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    S

    setDenominator(int) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.pregroup01.Fraction
    Sets the denominator of the fraction and simplifies it.
    setFractionPart(Fraction) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.MixedNumber
    Sets the fractional part of the mixed number.
    setNumerator(int) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.pregroup01.Fraction
    Sets the numerator of the fraction and simplifies the value.
    setWholePart(int) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.MixedNumber
    Sets the whole part of the mixed number.
    simplify() - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.pregroup01.Fraction
    Simplifies the fraction to its lowest terms and ensures the denominator is positive.
    styleButton(JButton) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.Calculator
    Styles a JButton with font and size.
    styleDropdown(JComboBox) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.Calculator
    Styles a JComboBox with font and centered text alignment.
    styleLabel(JLabel, boolean) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.Calculator
    Styles a JLabel either as a header or as a standard label.
    styleTextField(JTextField, boolean) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.Calculator
    Styles a JTextField with font, size, and alignment.
    subtract(MixedNumber) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.MixedNumber
    Subtracts another mixed number from this mixed number.
    subtract(Fraction) - Method in class prog2.edu.slu.pregroup01.Fraction
    Subtracts another fraction from this fraction.
